metric_caveats: Record_ids are the same 25-record validation slice used for G1-G7, selected from pragmatic-category mismatches in runs/gan_s0_expanded_builders_prose_full_validation_qwen35b_ollama_20260522T131822Z.
The slice is enriched for gold quantified or seizure-free/no-information cases predicted as unknown by Qwen 35b F0.
This is an example-strategy test against the same g2 candidates-adjudicate architecture, deterministic temporal candidates, GPT 4.1-mini model track, and deterministic scorer.
Do not compare slice accuracy directly to full-validation metrics; use it as a pre-full-validation regression gate.
